_comment: User-facing release notes shown in the in-app update banner. Edit this when you ship to master: add a NEW entry at the TOP of releases[]. Newest entry = what users see. Write plain, user-friendly bullets (no commit-speak), in both EN and FI. CI blocks PRs to master that don't touch this file unless they carry the 'skip-release-notes' label.

en: Log a goal even when you're not sure who scored
Recalculate a game's score from its goal log if the result looks wrong
fi: Kirjaa maali, vaikket olisi varma kuka sen teki
Laske ottelun tulos uudelleen maalikirjanpidosta, jos tulos näyttää väärältä
